name: DynaStash ER
summary: The DynaStash ER is an ideal addition to any DynaVap vaporisers, providing greater convenience, functionality, and portability.
description: The DynaStash ER is an ideal addition to any DynaVap vaporisers, providing greater convenience, functionality, and portability. This accessory is specifically designed to hold standard length DynaVap vaporisers (19mm) and maintain organisation and safety. If you're a DynaVap vaporiser owner looking for an even more portable experience, the DynaStash ER is the perfect solution. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps prescribed flower at its best for longer.
